case_title: HARRY PAIGE VS. ACE HARDWARE CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF HARRY PAIGE IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT ACE HARWARE CORPORATION IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY RICK KARP, PRESIDENT OF COEL HARDWARE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: SAMUEL LAW; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
